description: rag-plugin PreToolUse guardrail. Warns the user before running a Bash command that would fight the Qdrant single-process file lock while the ragtools service is up. Asks for confirmation only when BOTH (a) the command pattern matches a known lock-conflicting CLI invocation AND (b) the service is reachable on http://127.0.0.1:21420/health. Never denies. Mirrors the official security-guidance plugin pattern.
